arts.ttl: Nahki Wells: Bristol City striker on Cardiff sucker punch, Conway return and Boro 'six-pointer'
arts.sum: "Having been out there for the last 15, or 20 minutes of the game, it didn't feel like we were going to concede but it has been a reoccurring factor," explained the 34-year-old explained. Although the Reds are currently the closest they have ever been to the play-offs in the Bermudian's time at Ashton Gate, the last week or so has brought with it an all-too-familiar feeling for supporters and players alike.

arts.ttl: Ross McCrorie eyed for Crystal Palace transfer as Scotland star's stunning numbers blow Premier League scouts away
arts.sum: McCrorie has impressed in the English Championship and could land a move to the Premier League

arts.ttl: “Supper happy with step I took” – Attacker on his move to Middlesbrough, ‘delighted’ with treatment from fans
arts.sum: Kike García is pleased to have had a spell at Middlesbrough earlier in this career. The 35-year-old has been with Deportivo Alavés since 2023 and spoke to AS to review his long career. García was at Middlesbrough between 2014 and 2016 when Aitor Karanka was in charge at the club. arts.ttl: 'Affects you mentally' - Tommy Conway reveals Middlesbrough dressing room view on Michael Carrick - Teesside Live
arts.sum: “I think I speak on behalf of everyone in the changing room and club, we know results haven't gone our way and we fully understand the frustration of the fans,” he said of that social media post. Tommy Conway believes he speaks on behalf of every Middlesbrough player when he says everyone is working hard to improve results - and that they are behind manager Michael Carrick.

arts.ttl: Michael Carrick's family sacrifice point as he insists he cares deeply about Middlesbrough role
arts.sum: After a week of intense speculation surrounding his Middlesbrough future, Michael Carrick insists he cares deeply about turning fortunes around as he made a point about family sacrifice to emphasise the point. But making the point that he lives away from the family home in Manchester not seeing his immediate family for much of the week, the Boro boss insists his care and passion is not up for questioning.

arts.ttl: Liam Manning delivers fresh Adam Murphy update after Bristol City Under-21s appearance this week
arts.sum: Liam Manning has provided an update on Adam Murphy's position at Bristol City, admitting the Ireland youth international is training with the Reds' Under-21s rather than the first team having featured for the Young Robins this week. Although Manning confirmed the 19-year-old was not currently training with the rest of the first-team squad, he reinforced the idea that Murphy needs to build up his confidence and durability after such a slow start to his City career.

arts.ttl: What to expect from 'underwhelming' Middlesbrough and Michael Carrick ahead of Bristol City trip
arts.sum: In that sense, having two quickfire games away from home could be ideally timed for Carrick and Boro, with many supporters growing frustrated with the same old problems afflicting their side and the potential for the Riverside to turn quite toxic if things don’t improve. Yet, to Conway’s credit, but for two hamstring injuries, he’s pushed Latte Lath hard for a place in the team throughout the season, and at times even kept him out.

arts.ttl: Injuries, errors and Carrick: Why have Middlesbrough fallen below expectations this season?
arts.sum: Middlesbrough are 11th and just two points above 15th, falling far below what was expected from them in… The post Injuries, errors and Carrick: Why have Middlesbrough fallen below expectations this season? appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Delano Burgzorg Middlesbrough importance admission made after harsh selection call
arts.sum: After the Watford game, Carrick explained that the decision was a tactical one as he pushed Hayden Hackney into Burgzorg’s roaming wide role and started Dan Barlaser alongside Aidan Morris in an attempt to make the Boro side more defensively compact. Michael Carrick admitted Delano Burgzorg is now an important Middlesbrough player while playing down the decision to drop the forward in last weekend’s defeat to Watford.

arts.ttl: Potential Boro line-up for Bristol City after injury update from Michael Carrick
arts.sum: Giles was dropped for the Watford game as Carrick looked to solidify, but with the more mobile Dijksteel at right-back, Giles could add more attacking prowess to the Boro side. In terms of an injury update ahead of the game, Carrick said Fry would return after missing last weekend’s Watford defeat through illness.
